meta.title: GoGull — Real experiences, not endless scrolling
meta.description: Turn swipe addiction into real experiences. Fresh video previews of places around you.

hero.headline: knows where to go
hero.disclaimer: The app is currently available in a limited area. We're constantly expanding across Croatia!

users.title: For you
users.subtitle: Escape the endless scroll
users.intro: We take you from endless scrolling to real places around you — fast, clear and with no fake photos.

escape.title: Escape the feed
escape.description: Turn reel swiping into inspiration for real places around you.

video.title: Fresh video only
video.description: No outdated or misleading photos — just real video previews of places.

plan.title: Plan ahead
plan.description: Save locations and plan your next trips and nights out.

business.title: For business
business.subtitle: Targeted visibility, real interest
business.intro: Your location reaches people who are actually nearby and actually interested — without burning budget on a broad audience.
business.highlight: More affordable and precise than Google and Meta ads.

visibility.title: Targeted visibility
visibility.description: Only people within 50 km see your location.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: Insights into views, saves, and genuine user interest.

sales.title: More sales
sales.description: Share useful info with the right audience.

value.title: Better value
value.description: Far more affordable and precise than Google or Meta ads.

influencers.title: Influencer matchmaking
influencers.description: Find quality creators to shoot promo video for your business.

creators.title: For creators
creators.subtitle: More reach, direct collabs
creators.intro: Film the places you love, grow your reach and connect directly with businesses that need your content.

reach.title: More visibility
reach.description: Grow your reach and tag your other social profiles.

collab.title: Direct collaborations
collab.description: Our program connects you with businesses that need promo content.

freshness.title: You know every last detail before you go
freshness.paragraph: For every location we surface what matters most, and the community keeps it fresh together — so when you head somewhere, you know what's waiting for you down to the smallest detail. Neither Google nor ChatGPT can know about a place what we do: they show you photos and reviews that can be half a year old, while we show you what's happening right now.

old.title: Google · ChatGPT
old.p1: Photos and reviews months out of date
old.p3: No idea how it actually is right now

new.title: GoGull
new.p3: The community keeps it up to date

howItWorks.title: From scrolling to a real place in three steps
howItWorks.intro: No googling, no stale reviews — just what's happening right now.

scroll.title: Scroll
scroll.description: Open the app and scroll short video previews of places near you.

discover.title: Discover
discover.description: Watch fresh clips — you see the real vibe, not polished photos.

go.title: Go
go.description: Save a spot you like and turn it into a real experience.

footer.brandTagline: Turn swipe addiction into real experiences.
footer.newsletterDescription: Sign up and be the first to know when we arrive in your city!
footer.success: Thanks! We'll let you know when we reach your city.
footer.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
